title: dalbergaria ericae
intro: Dalbergaria ericae, commonly known as Dalbergia ericae, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae. It is also known as Dalbergia ericae, however, I can't confirm a more common name for this plant. I can't confirm any information about the health benefits of this plant.
side_effects: Dalbergaria ericae can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing liver damage, allergic reactions, and digestive issues in some individuals. Ingestion of excessive amounts can lead to symptoms like dizziness, nausea, and headaches, which may be severe in some cases. Prolonged exposure to its compounds can also increase the risk of kidney stones and interact negatively with certain medications. Furthermore, improper handling of the plant can result in skin irritation, respiratory problems, and even anaphylaxis in rare instances.
